case_title: NAN HEE KIM VS. CINTAS CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, NAN HEE AS TO DEFENDANT CINTAS CORPORATION SUNDERMAN, JOE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-08-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-10-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-27-2006
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR NOV-14-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-14-2006 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
AFTER HEARING, PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-17-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-08-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-17-2007 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST HYUNSON K. AHN, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-17-2007, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-01-2007. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: CARL SAUCEDA, CSR # 2031 (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-17-2007 CONTINUED TO APR-11-2007 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, NAN HEE SERVED APR-11-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CINTAS CORPORATION
SANCTION PAYMENT PAID BY ATTY FOR PLTF. H KENNETH AHN, ESQ. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, NAN HEE
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-11-2007 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-11-2007 CONTINUED TO JUL-11-2007 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S), AND FILE A DISMISSAL AS TO DEFENDANT JOE SUNDERMAN. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CINTAS CORPORATION SUNDERMAN, JOE
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR AUG-06-2007. JUL-11-2007 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR JEROME MARKS APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION AUG-06-2007 THROUGH NOV-04-2007.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-04-2007 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-04-2007 CONTINUED TO MAR-11-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED THROUGH FEB-15-2008. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON DEC-04-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR MAY-13-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. MAR-11-2008 ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-13-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
